title: fix: redirect to login screen on logout in elevator game
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Back to the lobby
gist.blurb: Fixed a quirky bug in the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge where logging out left you stuck in the shaft. Now you'll safely return to the login screen!
gist.summary: Resolved a state management issue in the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app to ensure users are properly redirected to the login screen upon logout.
gist.impact: Players will now experience a clean session reset and return to the main lobby when logging out of the game.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny bellhop hat, standing next to a retro pixel-art elevator with open doors. The Nomnom creature is waiting inside the elevator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny red bellhop hat, standing next to a retro open elevator with glowing lime green (#ecf874) buttons. The round tan Nomnom creature sits happily inside the elevator car. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and inviting.
